user.title: Add Smart Gate device
user.description: Enter the device address and Local API Token. For current firmware, this can be the Wi-Fi password.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Smart Gate device discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Home Assistant found {device_name} on your local network. Enter the Local API Token or Wi-Fi password if local auth is enabled.

reauth_confirm.title: Update Smart Gate local token
reauth_confirm.description: Enter the Local API Token or Wi-Fi password for this Smart Gate device.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Local API Token or Wi-Fi password.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Smart Gate device.
error.cannot_update_name: Could not update the Smart Gate device name.
error.rename_not_supported: This Smart Gate firmware does not support local device rename yet.
error.unsupported_product: This Smart Gate product is not supported yet.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_in_progress: This Smart Gate device is already being configured.
abort.already_configured: This Smart Gate device has already been added.
abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Smart Gate device.
abort.reauth_successful: Smart Gate local token was updated.
abort.unsupported_product: This Smart Gate product is not supported yet.
abort.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Smart Gate options
init.description: Update connection settings, local auth token, device name, or polling interval. Leave the token field blank to keep the stored token.
